name: Paladin of Felgrand
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨竜の聖騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パラディン・オブ・フェルグラント</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster from your hand or Deck to this card. This card is unaffected by other monsters' effects, while equipped with an Equip Card. You can Tribute 1 monster and this card, then target 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster from your hand or Deck to this card. This card is unaffected by other monsters' effects, while equipped with an Equip Card. You can Tribute 1 monster and this card, then target 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Revival of the Great Divine Dragon

action: Equips monsters from the player's Deck to itself
Equips monsters from the player's hand to itself
